texto: Play and productivity are no longer two separate worlds that rarely meet. They can come together like happy fistfuls of Play-Doh, beautifully blending to reveal the brand-new colors of a meaningful life. You get to play AND do. Play matters. Your life matters. It's time to manifest.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Marney K. Makridakis: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “Play and productivity are no longer two separate worlds that rarely meet. They can come together …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, coaching, creativity pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de termino e creativity.
